markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss event planning strategies for GrowthX's client Surge and for GrowthX's own CMO dinners.](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Surge seeks exclusive, high-end events to establish credibility and network with frontier AI labs](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [GrowthX wants CMO dinners for deal closing and relationship building, with more modest budgets](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Acquire to provide proposals for SF-based Surge event (\~20 people) and GrowthX CMO dinner options](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [Virtual event options discussed as potential strategy for geographic expansion](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)

## Topics

### Surge Event Requirements

  - [Exclusive, private venues (residences, clubs) with modern, buzzworthy appeal](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [High-profile guests from frontier AI labs (e.g., CTO of Meta)](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Elevated experiences with top-tier food, wine, and service](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
  - [Potential thought leader or speaker as draw](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Goal: Establish credibility and position Surge founder among top AI company leaders](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Budget: Flexible, prioritizing best possible experience (\~$55-75k for 20 people)](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)

### GrowthX CMO Dinners

  - [More modest than Surge events, but still unique and high-quality](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Typically 10-15 guests, mix of prospects and current clients](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [Previous budgets: $200-600 per person, open to higher for special occasions](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [Purpose: Close deals and strengthen client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [Interest in exploring virtual options for geographic expansion](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)

### Event Planning Services

  - [Acquire offers full-service planning: venue sourcing, chef selection, decor, gifts](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [Go-to-market support available to help fill events with target attendees](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [Virtual event capabilities with curated food/drink experiences](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [Pricing varies widely based on location, guest count, and level of service](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)

### Next Steps for Proposals

1.  San Francisco Surge team dinner (\~20 people)
      - [Showcase Acquire's top-tier capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
      - [Include full pricing and experience details](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
2.  GrowthX CMO dinner options
      - [In-person San Francisco dinner (10-15 guests, \~$1500-2250 total budget)](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
      - [Virtual dinner concept](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Acquire to create and submit proposals for Surge SF dinner and GrowthX CMO dinner options](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [GrowthX (Jason/Gloria) to determine date ranges for potential events](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
  - [Gloria to attend an Acquire virtual event to assess fit for GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [Explore potential collaboration between Acquire and GrowthX for shared target audience outreach](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [Gloria to serve as main point of contact for coordinating event planning efforts](https://fathom.video/share/r6_6fUcCsyWzrXaakW8EEGsSr6yfQwf8?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
